# StudentPerks

> StudentPerks (www.studentperks.dev) is a curated directory of 150+ free tools, cloud credits, and pro plans for students, startups, and open source projects. Every deal is verified with step-by-step claim instructions. Total value: $500K+.

## What We Offer

- **150+ Verified Deals** across Dev, AI, SaaS, Learning, Cloud, Design, and Entertainment
- **Step-by-step Guides** for claiming each deal (27 detailed guides)
- **Tool Comparisons** — VS pages, alternatives, and best-of lists
- **Interactive Tools** — Freebies Finder, Savings Calculator, Stack Builder, AI Deal Finder
- **Blog** with guides on free tools, cloud credits, and student discounts

## Audiences

- **Students** — free tools with .edu email verification (JetBrains, GitHub, Azure, Figma, etc.)
- **Startups** — cloud credits and SaaS plans (AWS $100K, Stripe Atlas, OpenAI credits, etc.)
- **Open Source** — free pro plans for OSS maintainers (Sentry, Railway, Cloudflare, etc.)

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.studentperks.dev
- All Deals: https://www.studentperks.dev/deals
- Student Discounts: https://www.studentperks.dev/student-discount
- Guides: https://www.studentperks.dev/guides
- Blog: https://www.studentperks.dev/blog
- Free Tools for Students: https://www.studentperks.dev/free-tools-for-students
- Freebies Finder: https://www.studentperks.dev/student-freebies-finder
- VS Comparisons: https://www.studentperks.dev/vs

## Top Deals by Category

### Cloud
- AWS Activate: up to $100K credits for startups
- Azure for Students: $100 free credits, no credit card
- Google Cloud: $300 credits + free tier
- DigitalOcean: $200 credits for students
- Vercel Pro: free for students and OSS

### Dev Tools
- JetBrains: all IDEs free for students ($649/year value)
- GitHub Student Developer Pack: 100+ tools free
- GitHub Copilot: free for students
- Docker Pro: free for students and OSS
- Supabase: $10/month credits for startups

### AI
- OpenAI: $2,500 API credits for startups
- Anthropic: API credits for startups
- GitHub Copilot: free AI coding assistant for students
- Perplexity Pro: student discount

### Design
- Figma: Education plan free
- Adobe Creative Cloud: 60% student discount
- Canva Pro: free for education

### Learning
- Coursera: free courses for students
- Codecademy Pro: student discount
- freeCodeCamp: completely free

- Full sitemap: https://www.studentperks.dev/sitemap.xml
- RSS Feed: https://www.studentperks.dev/blog/feed.xml
